footer.tagline: The ultimate social platform for gamers. Find your squad, build your community, and never game alone again.

home.subtitle: Swipe. Match. Game Together.
home.lead: The ultimate platform for gamers to find their perfect teammates, build lasting communities, and level up their gaming experience.
home.featuresSub: Discover features designed to connect gamers and build the ultimate gaming community
home.feature1Desc: Our AI-powered algorithm matches you with gamers who share your playstyle, skill level, and gaming preferences.
home.feature2Desc: Connect across PC, PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo Switch, and mobile. Find teammates regardless of your platform.
home.feature3Desc: Create or join gaming communities, organize tournaments, and build lasting friendships with fellow gamers.
home.howSub: Finding your gaming squad has never been easier
home.how1Desc: Set up your gaming profile with your favorite games, skill level, and what you're looking for in teammates.
home.how2Desc: Browse through potential teammates and communities. Swipe right on profiles that interest you.
home.how3Desc: Start chatting, plan gaming sessions, and build your ultimate gaming squad for epic adventures.
home.ctaSub: Join the gaming revolution and connect with players who share your passion

games.title: Popular Games
games.subtitle: Find your gaming community in the most popular titles. Connect with players who share your passion and skill level.
games.notFound: No games found. Please check back later.

blog.title: BLOG
blog.subtitle: Gaming tips, strategies, and news. Everything you need to level up your game and find your perfect squad.
blog.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to get the latest gaming news, tips, and updates delivered straight to your inbox.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions about Gamerplug? Need support? We're here to help you connect with the gaming community.
contact.emailDesc: Need help with your account, have a question, or want to report an issue? Send us an email and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.followDesc: Stay updated with the latest news, features, and community highlights. Follow us on Twitter for real-time updates and gaming tips.
contact.faqSub: Common questions about Gamerplug and how to get started

profile.userNotFoundBody: The user you're looking for doesn't exist.

hero.subtitle: Get your ideal player plugged in.

features.title: Level Up Your
features.subtitle: We've packed GamerPlug with everything you need to dominate the competition and find your people.
features.aiMatchingDesc: Our algorithm analyzes KD, win rate, and playstyle to pair you with teammates who actually complement your gameplay.
features.platformSyncDesc: Seamlessly connect your Steam, PSN, and Xbox accounts to show off your verified stats and ranks.
features.squadBuilderDesc: Create permanent parties, organize tournament teams, or just find a 5th for a quick ranked session.
features.toxicFreeDesc: Community driven reputation system ensures you play with chill people. Zero tolerance for rage-quitters.
features.lowLatencyDesc: Plan your strategies before you even launch the game with our built-in high fidelity voice and text chat.
features.tournamentsDesc: Join exclusive community tournaments directly through the app. Win prizes, skins, and bragging rights.

howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to stop playing with randoms and start winning with a coordinated team.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Link your stats, set your schedule, and choose your titles.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Browse tailored recommendations. Swipe right to squad up.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Chat, party up, and climb the leaderboards together.

cta.subtitle: Join thousands of gamers who are matching, chatting, and winning together right now.

demo.label: Demo
demo.subtitle: Watch how easy it is to find your perfect gaming squad.
demo.mobileDesc: Opens in the YouTube app when installed.

promise.label: Our Promise
promise.subtitle: Built on trust, authenticity, and community. Here's what we stand for.
promise.noNpcsDesc: Every profile is monitored to keep the platform real and legit.
promise.onlyGamersDesc: No bots. No spam. Just real gamers who actually want to play.
promise.goodVibesDesc: A healthy, respectful community where gaming is fun again.

team.label: Meet The Team
team.subtitle: A diverse team of gamers, engineers, and entrepreneurs united by one mission: revolutionizing how gamers connect.

phone.profileDesc: Immortal 3 Valorant player. Looking for a laid back duo or trio. No toxicity pls.

leaderboard.title: Top Referrers
leaderboard.subtitle: The gamers bringing the most players to GamerPlug
leaderboard.beTheFirst: Be the first to refer a gamer!

affiliates.title: Partner with
affiliates.subtitle: Join our squad. Monetize your influence. Help us cure gaming loneliness.
affiliates.applyDesc: Fill out the form below to join our affiliate program.
affiliates.whatIsSubtitle: The product you will be promoting.
affiliates.whatIsDesc1: GamerPlug is a swipe-based social platform designed to foster meaningful relationships for gamers worldwide. Founded in September 2025 and based in Austin, Texas, GamerPlug serves as a "borderless connector," helping moderate to serious gamers find their squad in a bot-free environment.
affiliates.whatIsDesc2: Unlike traditional platforms, GamerPlug users upload gameplay clips instead of static profile pictures, allowing the community to connect based on playstyle and skill. With a focus on safety and reducing friction, the platform solves the growing problem of loneliness in the gaming community.
affiliates.whyCareSubtitle: Key selling points for your content.
affiliates.clipFirstDesc: No catfish or bots. Users match based on actual gameplay video clips, ensuring skill and vibe compatibility.
affiliates.safetyDesc: A prioritized organized environment that eliminates the friction of finding a new community.
affiliates.futureFeaturesDesc: "Looking for Groups" (LFG) scheduling and "Game Now" for instant lobbies.
affiliates.stephanosDesc: The vision carrier. Stephanos focuses on keeping the team vibe high and leading strategic user acquisition.
affiliates.hunterDesc: Chief Visionary Officer. Hunter works to strengthen the community connection and product roadmap.

tac.title: Terms &
tac.s01Desc: By accessing and using Gamerplug ("the Service"), you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.
tac.s02Desc: Permission is granted to temporarily use Gamerplug for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:
tac.s02L2: Use the materials for any commercial purpose or for any public display
tac.s02L3: Attempt to reverse engineer any software contained in the Service
tac.s02L4: Remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials
tac.s03Desc: To access certain features of the Service, you must create an account. You agree to:
tac.s03L1: Provide accurate, current, and complete information
tac.s03L2: Maintain the security of your password
tac.s03L3: Accept responsibility for all activities under your account
tac.s03L4: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
tac.s04Desc: When using Gamerplug, you agree not to post, upload, or share content that:
tac.s04L1: Is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, or offensive
tac.s04L3: Contains malware or other harmful code
tac.s04L4: Is spam or unsolicited promotional material
tac.s05Desc: For gaming clips and content shared on the platform:
tac.s05L1: You retain ownership of your original content
tac.s05L2: You grant us a license to display and distribute your content on the platform
tac.s05L3: Content must comply with game publishers' terms of service
tac.s05L4: We reserve the right to remove content that violates these terms
tac.s06Desc: You may not use the Service:
tac.s06L1: For any unlawful purpose or to solicit unlawful acts
tac.s06L2: To violate any international, federal, provincial, or state regulations or laws
tac.s06L3: To harass, abuse, insult, harm, defame, slander, disparage, intimidate, or discriminate
tac.s06L4: To submit false or misleading information
tac.s06L5: To interfere with or circumvent the security features of the Service
tac.s07Desc: We strive to keep the Service available at all times, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted access. The Service may be temporarily unavailable due to maintenance, updates, or circumstances beyond our control.
tac.s08Desc: We may terminate or suspend your account and access to the Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including if you breach the Terms. You may also delete your account at any time.
tac.s09Desc: The Service is provided "as is" without any representations or warranties. We disclaim all warranties, whether express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose.
tac.s10Desc: In no event shall Gamerplug or its suppliers be liable for any damages arising out of or in connection with your use of the Service. This limitation applies to all damages of any kind.
tac.s11Desc: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws and regulations of the jurisdiction where Gamerplug operates.
tac.s12Desc: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
tac.s13Desc: If you have any questions about these Terms & Conditions, please contact us through our app or official social media channels.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.s01Desc: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, upload gaming clips, or contact us for support.
privacy.s01L3: Gaming clips and videos you upload
privacy.s02Desc: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services:
privacy.s02L1: To create and manage your account
privacy.s02L2: To enable you to connect with other gamers
privacy.s02L3: To facilitate sharing of gaming content
privacy.s02L4: To send notifications about matches and messages
privacy.s02L5: To improve our app and user experience
privacy.s03Desc: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties, except:
privacy.s03L3: To protect our rights and the safety of our users
privacy.s03L4: With service providers who assist in operating our platform
privacy.s04Desc: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no internet transmission is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s05Desc: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to provide our services and fulfill the purposes outlined in this privacy policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law.
privacy.s06L3: Delete your account and personal information
privacy.s07Desc: Our service is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that we have collected personal information from a child under 13, we will take steps to delete such information.
privacy.s08Desc: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new privacy policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date at the top of this policy.
privacy.s09Desc: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or our privacy practices, please contact us through our app or social media channels.
